mapper.insert: insert into ai_device (device_name, rtsp_url, snapshot_url, identify_interval, alarm_interval)values(#{deviceName}, #{rtspUrl}, #{snapshotUrl}, #{identifyInterval}, #{alarmInterval})
insert into ai_device_algorithm (device_id, algorithm_id, status, sensitivity, pixels, alarm_times)values(#{deviceId}, #{algorithmId}, #{status}, #{sensitivity}, #{pixels}, #{alarmTimes})
mapper.select: select ai_device_algorithm.id as id, device_id, ai_device_algorithm.algorithm_id as algorithm_id, algorithm_name, status, sensitivity, pixels, alarm_times from ai_device_algorithm inner join ai_algorithm on ai_device_algorithm.algorithm_id = ai_algorithm.algorithm_id where device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.update: update ai_device set device_name = #{deviceName}, rtsp_url = #{rtspUrl}, snapshot_url = #{snapshotUrl}, identify_interval = #{identifyInterval}, alarm_interval = #{alarmInterval} where ai_device.device_id = #{deviceId}
update ai_device_group set group_id = #{groupId} where device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.select: select ai_device.device_id as device_id, group_id, device_name from ai_device inner join ai_device_group on ai_device.device_id = ai_device_group.device_id
mapper.update: update ai_device set check_status = #{checkStatus} where device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.select: select device_id, rtsp_url from ai_device where check_status = 0
select rtsp_url from ai_device where device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.update: update ai_device set device_lng = #{deviceLng}, device_lat = #{deviceLat} where device_id = #{deviceId}
